message:
🐛 Fix consistency test violations (#2551)

- useSelfUpgrade.ts: Extract magic number 1500 → RELOAD_DELAY_MS constant
- useSearchIndex.ts: Add || [] guard to for...of on LEGACY_COMPONENT_KEYS
- notificationStatus.ts: Rename THIRTY_DAYS_MS → VERIFICATION_TTL_MS to
  match the consistency check's TTL constant pattern
- consistency-test.sh: Exclude useSelfUpgrade.ts from cache TTL check
  (uses Date.now() for restart polling elapsed, not data caching)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -453,6 +453,7 @@ phase6() {
     'src/components/cards/workload-monitor/GitHubCIMonitor.tsx'  # Date.now() for demo data, not cache TTL
     'src/components/cards/Missions.tsx'  # Date.now() for demo mission timestamps, not cache TTL
     'src/App.tsx'  # Date.now() for page view analytics duration, not cache TTL
+    'src/hooks/useSelfUpgrade.ts'  # Date.now() for restart polling elapsed, not cache TTL
   )
 
   # Find files that implement caching with TTL: have localStorage AND Date.now() - (subtraction
